$comment: Machine-readable symptom -> chapter map for the Solana Error Doctor. Match `signals` against the user's pasted error text (case-insensitive substring) or `codes` against a numeric/hex program error code, then open the chapter file and jump to the anchor. Ordered most-frequent first within each layer.

anchor_error_code_base.custom_errors: 6000+ (0x1770+) — your program's #[error_code] enum, in declaration order
anchor_error_code_base.note: Hex shown in logs: 6000=0x1770, 6001=0x1771, 2006=0x7d6, 2001=0x7d1, 3002=0xbba, 3003=0xbbb, 3012=0xbc4. Convert hex->dec to map.

entries.one_line: Client-derived PDA != on-chain seeds=[...]: seed order, byte encoding, or missing/extra bump.

signals: A has one constraint was violated
entries.one_line: The field on the loaded account doesn't equal the key of the account passed for it.
Wrong account type/layout, or struct changed without migration — 8-byte discriminator or field layout mismatch.
`space` omitted the 8-byte discriminator or undersized a field. Use 8 + InitSpace.
An account marked Signer wasn't passed as a signer, or a PDA tried to sign without invoke_signed.
PDA CPI needs the exact seeds+bump in invoke_signed; a normal account can't escalate to signer.
Resize is capped at +10,240 bytes/instr and the account must stay rent-exempt — top up lamports.
System Cargo (>=1.83) wrote a v4 Cargo.lock that build-sbf's bundled old Cargo can't parse.
A transitive crate needs Rust 1.85; platform-tools Rust is older. Use latest toolchain or the MSRV resolver.

signals: Detected sbpf_version required by the executable
entries.one_line: Build emitted an sBPF VM version newer than the cluster enables. Build with `--arch` matched to the cluster.
declare_id! != the keypair in target/deploy. Run `anchor keys sync` and rebuild.

signals: current package believes it's in a workspace
believes it's in a workspace when it's not
this may be fixable by adding `[workspace]`
entries.one_line: A standalone crate inside a repo with a root workspace. Add an empty [workspace] to its Cargo.toml.

signals: cannot be built because it requires
entries.one_line: Anchor <-> Agave <-> rustc version skew. Align to a known-good matrix (see chapter).
The blockhash aged out (~151 blocks / 60-90s) before the tx landed, or commitment/RPC mismatch.
No/low priority fee, default 200k CU, RPC retry off, or outbid. Use the 5-step landing recipe.
Ran past the CU limit (default 200k). Simulate to size, then setComputeUnitLimit.
Past the 1232-byte cap. Move to a v0 transaction with Address Lookup Tables.
Unfiltered gPA scans the whole program. Add memcmp+dataSlice, or use getProgramAccountsV2 / DAS.
Public RPC throttling. Use a dedicated endpoint; batch; back off; avoid hot polling.
Prefer transfer_checked (validates mint+decimals); classic transfer is deprecated in spirit.
ATA owner must be a system account or an off-curve PDA (allowOwnerOffCurve); account may not exist yet.
Token-2022 needs the right program id + extension accounts; transfer-fee/hook change amounts and account lists.
Browser bundler (Vite/webpack5/Next) lacks Node polyfills. Provide a Buffer polyfill.
Harmless native-binding warning from bigint-buffer; silence it or ignore — not a real error.
Wallet providers ran during SSR. Make them client-only / dynamic import with ssr:false.
Local validator flaky/stale ledger. Clear the ledger, or move to LiteSVM/Surfpool.
solana-bankrun is deprecated; migrate to LiteSVM (in-process SVM, fast, deterministic).
Pyth Pull/Switchboard On-Demand require posting a fresh update and checking staleness + confidence before use.
